hero.title: Ukondla iMoya, ukwakha iCommunity
hero.subtitle: I-Awomi Umthombho i-Feeding Scheme ijolise ekunikeni ukutya okunesondlo kubantu abasweleyo e-Mandela Park, eKhayelitsha.

mission.title: Umsebenzi wethu
mission.intro: I-AWOMI UMTHOMBO i-Feeding Scheme yi-non-profit organisation eKapa, eKhayelitsha ekwaxhama ukulwa nesidlo sungasoki. Le organisation iqhuba inkqubo yokunikela ukutya imihla ngemihla kubantu abasweleyo.
mission.funding: Le projekthi ifuna inkxaso-mali, ubuhlobo, kunye neminikelo ukuze iqhubeke kwaye iphuhlise impembelelo yayo.
mission.problem: Ukuswela ukutya kuses saleni eMzantsi Afrika. Amakhaya amanengi eKapa ajongene nokuswela kwemisebenzi nentswela-ntle, nto leyo ibangela ukuba abantwana bahambe besixaxa begqibe kwaye amakhaya angekho nakwizinto ezisisiseko zokutya.
mission.solution: I-Feeding scheme ijolise ekunciphiseni indlala ngelixa iphucula impilo, isidlo, kunye nokuzinza kwezentlalo.

dailyMeals.title: Ukutya kwemihla ngemihla
dailyMeals.desc: Ukunikela amakhulu eekalori zokutya ezinesondlo ngemihla kubantu basecweni abasweleyo.

children.title: Inkqubo yabantwana
children.desc: Kuqinisekiswa ukuba abantwana bafumana isondlo esifanelekileyo ukuze bakhule begqibe.

elderly.title: Inkxaso kwabathuthukileyo
elderly.desc: Ukuhambisa ukutya kwabo bangabathuthukileyo abanokungabinangxaki yokufumana ukutya.

biography.title: Umfundisi wethu
biography.story: I-Awomi Umthombho yasekwa ngengcamu elula: ukuba wonke umntu unelungelo lokufumana ukutya okunesondlo. Oku kuqala njengenyathelo elincinci lokunikela ukutya kubamelwana abambalwa kuye kwaba sisikhwama sentlalo esikhonzela amakhulu eekalori zokutya yonke imihla.
biography.community: Umfundisi wethu, ongqwabalala kuluntu lwaseMandela Park, waqonda ukuba indlala yayinguengxaki yomntu ngamnye kungenanto ingxaki yentlalo eyayidinga inyathelo leentlalo. Ngokuzimisela, inhlekelele, nokungahambi phambili, i-Feeding scheme ibe sisibane sethemba kumakhaya amanengi.
biography.continuation: Siquka ukuwandisa isigxina sikawonke-wonke ngelixa sishiya umsebenzi osisiseko: ukondla imizwa, ukusisa iwundla, nokwakha uluntu olunamandla noluqine.

form.name: Igama
form.success: Enkosi! I-imeyile yakho kufuneka ivule ukuze ithumele umyalezo.

footer.brand: Ukuxhoma uluntu lwethu ngokutya, imfundo, kunye nokukhula okuhlala.
